mode.description: "new" scaffolds a fresh action; "edit" revises an existing one.

actionName.description: The existing action's name (edit mode). null for new mode.

proposedName.description: New mode only — the user's chosen name. Honor it unless invalid.

actionDir.description: Absolute path to the action's directory (edit mode).

actionsDir.description: Absolute path to the parent actions directory (new mode).

skillMdBefore.description: Current SKILL.md text (edit mode). Empty for new mode.

userFeedback.description: The user's free-text feedback. Treat as the spec.
